ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the component */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the component */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the component */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Material type (e.g., Steel, Stainless Steel) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the component was last updated */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Allowed tolerance for the component dimensions */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the component */,
  "max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature */,
  "min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature */,
  "corrosion_resistance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is corrosion-resistant */,
  "surface_finish" TEXT /* Description of the surface finish */,
  "tensile_strength" TEXT /* Tensile strength of the material */,
  "yield_strength" TEXT /* Yield strength of the material */,
  "vendor_code" TEXT /* Vendor-specific code for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_material_type FOREIGN KEY ("material_type") REFERENCES material_types ("material_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "material_types" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material type */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material type */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the material */,
  "elastic_modulus" TEXT /* Elastic modulus of the material */,
  "thermal_conductivity" TEXT /* Thermal conductivity of the material */,
  "electrical_conductivity" TEXT /* Electrical conductivity of the material */,
  "cost_per_kg" REAL /* Cost per kilogram of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_equivalents" (
  "equivalent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equivalent component */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "material_type" TEXT /* Material type of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_weight" REAL /* Weight of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_max_temperature" REAL /* Maximum operating temperature of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_min_temperature" REAL /* Minimum operating temperature of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_corrosion_resistance" INTEGER /* Indicates if the equivalent component is corrosion-resistant */,
  "equivalent_surface_finish" TEXT /* Description of the surface finish of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_tensile_strength" TEXT /* Tensile strength of the equivalent component */,
  "equivalent_yield_strength" TEXT /* Yield strength of the equivalent component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equivalent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_equivalents_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_equivalents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the version */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the component */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time the component was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the component */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the attribute value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_attributes_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "image_size" TEXT /* Size of the image file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_images_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of the document (e.g., datasheet, user manual) */,
  "document_path" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time the document was uploaded */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "document_size" TEXT /* Size of the document file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_documents_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_tags_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)
